understanding.goal_understanding: Place each selectable piece onto a goal tile marked '+', ensuring all goals are simultaneously occupied by pieces to win the level and progress through all levels of the game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Pieces are selected and moved by clicking target positions; movement succeeds if the path is clear but fails or has no effect if blocked by obstacles or walls. Clicking the current position or invalid spots often results in no movement. Only one piece appears to be actively selected at a time, with back-and-forth toggling between positions like [9,21] and [18,21]. Steps are limited per level, and exhausting them ends the run.
